title: Isolate workloads by namespace and NetworkPolicy
description: Use namespaces as the unit of RBAC, quota, and naming isolation, and default-deny NetworkPolicy so pods only reach intended peers.
body: Use when placing a new workload or separating environments/tenants in one cluster. Do not put unrelated tenants in the default namespace with open pod-to-pod traffic. Actions: create a namespace per boundary, attach a ResourceQuota and LimitRange, and apply a default-deny NetworkPolicy plus explicit allow rules for required ingress/egress. Validation signals include a denied connection test between namespaces that should not talk and quota enforcement on excess requests. Risk boundary: removing a default-deny policy or merging tenant namespaces is an isolation change requiring review.
